issues.title: Checkout total drifts after coupon rollback

decisions.title: Move coupon rollback into pricing reducer
decisions.context: State mutation happens in both cart and payment views.
decisions.decision: Normalize rollback in the reducer and keep UI as a pure renderer.
decisions.consequence: Lower UI drift, requires reducer regression coverage.

decisions.title: Reject view-level patch
decisions.context: A view-only fix hides drift in one checkout route.
decisions.decision: Do not patch the component total calculation.
decisions.consequence: Slightly larger diff, better cross-route behavior.

acceptance.label: Unit tests cover coupon add, remove, rollback
